overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit commercial district. The player moves from an open plaza past storefronts with holographic advertisements and along streets with futuristic vehicle traffic, featuring prominent purple, cyan, and orange neon lighting reflecting off wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza leading to commercial arcade

events.description: moving from open plaza into covered commercial walkway with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through rain-soaked plaza toward neon-lit commercial buildings

entered.detail: rain-soaked reflective ground surface with neon light reflections
large rectangular planter with vegetation on the left side of the plaza
large orange neon sign reading 'PRIMA' on the building facade
purple neon signage with Japanese characters indicating a restaurant
archway entrance illuminated with purple neon lights leading deeper into the commercial district

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a rain-soaked open plaza with wet pavement reflecting ambient light. The camera moves forward toward a commercial arcade entrance marked by vibrant purple neon lights, with the large orange 'PRIMA' store sign becoming visible on the right as the player approaches the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping arcade with holographic storefronts

events.description: turning slightly right to follow the curve of the storefronts
passing by holographic mannequin displays and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking past the PRIMA store and examining the detailed cyberpunk storefronts and advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking toward the camera through the rain

entered.detail: full storefront view with orange neon lettering and entrance displays
futuristic purple vending machine with holographic interface
large purple-lit display window with futuristic fashion mannequins
blue neon sign with 'PARILLA' text visible down the arcade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered arcade sidewalk, the player passes the prominent PRIMA store with its bright orange signage and holographic fashion displays. The environment features futuristic vending machines and neon-lit storefronts while a pedestrian with an umbrella approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with futuristic retail displays approaching main street

events.description: pedestrian temporarily blocks view of the boutique storefront
approaching main street intersection with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past various neon-lit shops toward the main road

notable_agents.action: person standing and examining a cyberpunk mannequin display in a store window

entered.detail: storefront with teal neon trim and holographic displays showing 'CYBER-WEAR'
wet asphalt street with traffic markings becoming visible ahead
curved glass storefront with glowing cyan accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving past additional cyberpunk boutiques with teal and cyan neon lighting, the player approaches a main street intersection. A pedestrian stands examining a holographic display, while the view opens up to reveal the wet asphalt road with approaching vehicle traffic and distant neon billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with vehicle traffic and holographic advertisements

events.description: futuristic black vehicle passes by on the wet street
continuing straight along the sidewalk parallel to moving traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the main street with cyberpunk traffic and large holographic signs ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past on the wet road with headlights on
pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: multi-lane wet asphalt road with red and yellow lane markings reflecting neon lights
massive red holographic advertisement depicting a samurai figure floating above the street
tall building with multiple illuminated billboards and signage
metal barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the player walking alongside a busy commercial street with moving vehicle traffic. A futuristic black car passes by on the wet asphalt while ahead, a massive red holographic samurai advertisement dominates the skyline. The player continues along the sidewalk with other pedestrians, surrounded by towering buildings covered in bright neon billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a rain-soaked open plaza into the dense, neon-saturated heart of a cyberpunk commercial district. It begins by gliding across wet pavement toward a covered arcade entrance, where the ambient light shifts as a vibrant purple glow and a large orange PRIMA store sign emerge. As the camera moves under the walkway, the scene transitions into a corridor of holographic fashion displays and futuristic vending machines, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella. The view then opens up at a main street intersection, shifting from the intimate arcade to a wide urban vista of teal and cyan boutiques and wet asphalt roads. Finally, the camera follows the sidewalk alongside flowing vehicle traffic and passing pedestrians, moving toward a skyline dominated by a massive red holographic samurai and towering neon billboards.
